title: Security Compliance Audit: Configuration Review
description: Please review the current workspace configuration as described in CONFIG_REVIEW.md against the internal secret-handling policy defined in KB-SEC-101. Update this task with a summary of findings, noting any violations or confirming compliance.

title: Monthly Vulnerability Scan
description: Run the monthly vulnerability scan against staging environment and report findings in the security dashboard.

title: Access Review: Finance Dept
description: Conduct quarterly access review for the Finance department. Verify user permissions and remove any stale accounts.
